subject: A sun-drenched landscape with rolling green hills, a natural stone arch, and a clifftop structure under a blue sky with clouds
description: A wide landscape painting showing rolling hills of green and golden grass in the foreground. A large natural stone arch rises from the hillside in the mid-ground, framing the open sky beyond. Atop a cliff or elevated plateau in the background stands a geometric structure, suggesting architecture built into or atop the rock formation. The sky is bright blue with white cumulus clouds. The overall lighting is bright and clear, with a warm daylight quality. No figures are present.
foreground: Rolling green and golden grass hills
background: Stone arch, clifftop ruins or structure, bright blue sky
